---
title: "Water Quality Maps"
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
---

::: {.column-margin}
:::

# Water sampling

San Roque Lake.

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| column: screen-inset

library(terra)
library(leaflet)
library(leafem)
library(leaflet.extras)

p <- data.frame(x = -64.468102, y = -31.376373) |>
  vect(geom = c("x", "y"), crs = "EPSG:4326")
p$label <- "a"

leaflet(p) |>
  setView(
    lng = as.numeric(geom(p)[, "x"]),
    lat = as.numeric(geom(p)[, "y"]),
    zoom = 13
  ) |>
  addTiles(group = "OSM (default)") |>
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$CartoDB.Positron,
    group = "Positron (minimal)",
    options = providerTileOptions(noWrap = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$Esri.WorldImagery,
    group = "World Imagery (satellite)",
    options = providerTileOptions(noWrap = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addMarkers(popup = ~label, group = "grupo") |>
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c(
      "OSM (default)",
      "Positron (minimal)",
      "World Imagery (satellite)"
    ),
    overlayGroups = "grupo",
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addResetMapButton() |>
  addFullscreenControl(position = "bottomright")
```

# Methodology

- Chlorophyll-a
- Cyanobacteria
